intro: Pleurothallis neibana, also known as Neiban's Pleurothallis, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America, characterized by its small, delicate flowers and slender leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, which may help to reduce inflammation, protect against cell damage, and combat infections. Bioactive constituents of Pleurothallis neibana include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as digestive problems and skin conditions.
